```{=html}
<aside class="side-panel stress-presets-sidebar">
<details>
<summary>Curve presets</summary>
<dl>
  <dt>Flat @ S<sub>0</sub></dt>
  <dd>Constant path — under μ = 0 the mean path. Books should land
  near the MC means.</dd>

  <dt>Linear ±50%</dt>
  <dd>Calibrates how μ acts on each book — monotone path without
  curvature.</dd>

  <dt>Crash @ ½T</dt>
  <dd>Mid-year collapse. Informative at coverage just under 100%: the
  crash may land inside the uncovered window.</dd>

  <dt>Spike @ ⅓T</dt>
  <dd>Brief rally the back-to-back book has to buy through.</dd>

  <dt>Random walk</dt>
  <dd>Hand-drawn GBM approximation — typical realisation, not a
  substitute for the MC.</dd>

  <dt>Historical</dt>
  <dd>Real kVCM series. Disabled when
  <code>data/kvcm-historical.json</code> is missing (regenerate via
  <code>npm run fetch:prices</code>).</dd>
</dl>
<p>Raise <em>noise σ²</em> to layer a seeded log-normal shock on top
of the drawn path and test how robust a narrative is to day-to-day
jitter.</p>
</details>
</aside>
```
